name: Rental Yield Calculator
seo_description: Calculate rental property yield. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate yield: 150,000 EUR property, 1,000 EUR/month rent.
result_context: The yield_pct of {yield_pct}% is the gross rental yield before expens is and vacancies.
mistakes: Using gross yield without accounting for expens is (taxes, maintenance, vacancies)
Not including purchase costs in total investment calculation
Comparing yields across markets without considering appreciation potential
desc: Free online rental yield calculator. Enter annual rent and property value to get instant results.
